patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/current_thread_executor.py b/asgiref/current_thread_executor.py
index 6293cbd..bba966c 100644
--- a/asgiref/current_thread_executor.py
+++ b/asgiref/current_thread_executor.py
@@ -120,4 +120,4 @@ class CurrentThreadExecutor(Executor):
             executor = executor._old_executor
 
         # Return the future
-        return f
+        return f
\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/asgiref/server.py b/asgiref/server.py
index 131ea43..288293b 100644
--- a/asgiref/server.py
+++ b/asgiref/server.py
@@ -67,7 +67,7 @@ class StatelessServer:
         Runs the asyncio event loop with our handler loop.
         """
 
-        class Done(Exception):
+        class Done:
             pass
 
         async def handle():
@@ -170,4 +170,4 @@ class StatelessServer:
             exception,
             "".join(traceback.format_tb(exception.__traceback__)),
             f"  {exception}",
-        )
+        )
\ No newline at end of file
